_comment: Operational envelope for one CLI invocation, in crm.app. Lifecycle: open the store (integrity check), authenticate the session, authorize the command, execute the domain operation, then terminate. Placement: in-memory, one instance per process invocation, not persisted. Concurrency: one OS process per invocation; the store's write transaction serializes committing writers, and a lost race surfaces as a ConflictError that the aggregate persist overlay (Deal/Task) already retried, so this envelope only reports the outcome (refused). It runs no retry loop of its own.

_delays.OPEN_TIMEOUT: 3000 ms - opening and integrity-checking the local database file
_delays.AUTH_TIMEOUT: 2000 ms - reading and validating the session file
_delays.AUTHZ_TIMEOUT: 2000 ms - reading the target record's owner and team for the scope check
_delays.EXEC_TIMEOUT: 5000 ms - running the domain operation including its own bounded persist retries
